question_text: Two hairdryers are compared: Hairdryer A has a power rating of 1,200 W and Hairdryer B has a power rating of 1,500 W. Both are used for 10 minutes. Which statement is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: Both hairdryers use the same amount of energy

options.label: B
options.text: Hairdryer A uses more energy because it has a lower power rating

options.label: C
options.text: Hairdryer B uses more energy because it has a higher power rating

options.label: D
options.text: We cannot compare the energy without knowing the voltage

explanation: Since both hairdryers are used for the same time (10 minutes), the one with the higher power rating will use more energy. Hairdryer B (1,500 W) uses more energy than Hairdryer A (1,200 W). Energy depends on both power and time: the higher the power, the more energy used in the same time period.
